Imported from GameChanger screenshot. Week 5 Game 2. 19 hits in a 17-6 rout to split the night. HARM'S NIGHT: 3-for-3, 3 HR, 10 RBI — a new franchise single-game RBI record (broke Glove's 8) and the 4th three-homer game in club history. Tristan 4-for-4.
